title: Greenidge Expands Bitcoin Mining with Mississippi Site Launch - 2400 Miners Deployment
text: Greenidge Bitcoin Mining Expansion - Mississippi Site Launch. Mississippi Site Launch: Newest bitcoin mining site located in Mississippi went live July 1 2024. Deployment of 2400 bitcoin miners at launch. 12-acre property acquired earlier in 2024. Built utilizing proprietary Greenidge Pod X technology. Power Access: Currently has access to 8.5 MW of power at Mississippi site. Plans to obtain at least 25 MW of additional power within next 12 months. Multi-State Operations: Greenidge Pod X deployed at sites in New York South Carolina North Dakota and Mississippi. 122 MW of total power capacity across four bitcoin mining facilities. Approximately 8000 miners in operation. Technology Innovation: Greenidge Pod X offers innovative design with optimal temperatures. Superior uptime and better longevity for mining operations. Pod X capacity 792 miners (35% more than other pod manufacturers). Low pod and infrastructure $/kW cost ratios in industry. North Dakota and South Carolina Expansion: Recently acquired 60 MW future low-cost power in South Carolina. 7.5 MW mining capacity in North Dakota. Strategic Multi-Site Approach: Distributed mining operations across multiple states. Leveraging regional power advantages and cost structures. Scaling mining fleet efficiently.
